text: I got a job for you. You put the pail in here and the spuds in here. You have done this before,
haven't you? No. You put the pail in here and the spuds in here. Spuds? Yes. Proper name's potato,
but we call them spuds. Potato. Potato! Zimniak. What? Zimniak. Right.
You look like a potato. You look like a bag of potatoes.
It's not good, I can't understand a word you're saying.
And don't get artistic, just peel the bloomin' thing.
